meta_description: Live demo of the GastroHub restaurant platform. Hub Bistro, sandboxed-live, no registration. See the admin dashboard and customer view in a real ordering system.
subline: You see the full system the way a real restaurant owner sees it. Menu, cart, checkout, order acceptance in the admin dashboard. Everything works. No real charges, no real notifications.
what_title: What you can test in the demo
card_customer_body: Browse the menu, add dishes to the cart, enter a delivery address, go to checkout. Exactly what your guests will see.
card_admin_body: Accept orders, manage menu, configure delivery zones, set opening hours. No login, a single click on "Demo-Admin betreten" is enough.
card_account_body: Register, log in, see order history, save addresses. Works with any test data, no real email is sent.
safety_b1: No real payments. Stripe is disabled.
safety_b2: No real notifications. Nobody is contacted by email, SMS or Telegram.
safety_b3: The demo is reset overnight. Anything you enter is temporary.
questions_body: What does setup cost in your case? Which pricing model fits? How long does the switch from your current system take? Usually resolved in 10 minutes over the phone.
